calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Beachside Media Network, a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Sydney Fairbairn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff AnyClip LTD.
Yossi Amir, Chief Financial Officer for plaintiff AnyClip LTD., was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Fairbairn and Mr. Amir appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Beachside Media Network, a California corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Money/Common Counts was filed on October 16, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Beachside Media Network's authorized Agent of Process occurred on November 20, 2019, and was effectuated on December 1, 2019.
Default as to defendant Beachside Media Network, a California corporation, was entered on August 12, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 12, 2020.

Plaintiff AnyClip LTD submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Copies of plaintiff's original entries for Accounts Receivable.............ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff AnyClip LTD, and against the defaulted defendant Beachside Media Network, a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $103,551.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,837.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $764.50.

Total - $108,352.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
